mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player (id, first_name, last_name, agreeability, aggressiveness, honesty, specialty, country_id, gender_id) VALUES ( #{player.id}, #{player.firstName}, #{player.lastName}, #{player.agreeability}, #{player.aggressiveness}, #{player.honesty}, #{player.specialty}, #{player.countryId}, #{player.genderId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE first_name = VALUES(first_name), last_name = VALUES(last_name), agreeability = VALUES(agreeability), aggressiveness = VALUES(aggressiveness), honesty = VALUES(honesty), specialty = VALUES(specialty), country_id = VALUES(country_id), gender_id = VALUES(gender_id);
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.agreeability, p.aggressiveness, p.honesty, p.specialty, p.country_id, p.gender_id FROM player p JOIN player_data pd ON pd.id = p.id WHERE pd.team_id = #{teamId};
SELECT p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.agreeability, p.aggressiveness, p.honesty, p.specialty, p.country_id, p.gender_id FROM player p WHERE p.id = #{playerId};
